channel.title: Announcements (new posts)
channel.description: Posts in the forum category "Announcements" - Announce new pages and site-wide events here. Authors, please use the collective SCP, Tale, GOI Entry, and Update threads for new works.

item.title: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: The Moloch Mentality - Site-43 world tour goes to India, and has a crisis of conscience.

item.title: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.: Re: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5334 is a 8 feet long, 1 foot wide, and 2 feet, 6 inches tall Chilopoda. SCP-5334's body segments are covered in a thick shell, with dark brown stripes covering the black shell. Protruding from the shells are 2 feet tall horns, which are used as a defense mechanism. A pair of legs appear on every body segment. SCP-5334 has around 173 body segments. SCP-5334's head is an inch longer than its body segments, and contains a horn at the tip of its head. The horn is a inch larger than the previous horns. Two 1 foot antennae protrude from the face of SCP-5334 as well in back end. Two pincers, 1 foot and 8 inches each, are attached to SCP-5334's head, which are used to grab and crush prey.

Deleted at -15 and three votes.

item.title: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.: Re: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.
item.content:encoded:
SCP 5129 is a humanoid who has powers. Gender is male. Age is ten. Real name is Calvin Boone. That can destroy the universe normally he is good but sometimes he takes advantage of his powers. Like threaten people to get what he wants. Which is not fair and also fights dangerous SCPs in the testing of his abilities. Also, He is used to containing other SCPs. The humaniod has every single super power and has the ability go to heaven without passing away. We didn't learn much about him.

Deleted at -28 and three votes.

SCP-5378 is a shape shifting entity that can only change colors into different hues and shades of brown. It can be recognized by its black scalaria with white pupils. Its original shape is similar to a venison with a stretched out spine which makes the neck and tail serpent like. Has a main of curly hair, Bovidae horns and feathered wings when calmed and in private.. Mostly appears as a well-dressed, 7'4" humanoid with white skin and deer like ears.

Deleted at -20 and three votes.

SCP-5921 summarily deleted following a failed self-delete. Yossipossi and OCuin witnessing.

SCP-5978 is an Humanoid entity of height 63.7 inches with zero mass. SCP-5978 has facial features such has a nose, But has hollow eyes and a Wide open mouth (which also appears to be hollow). SCP-5978 appears to have a female body. She wears a tunic covered by a scapular and cowl and a veil. SCP-5978 face appears to have a slight pigment of red on it as well.

Deleted at -16 and three votes.

SCP-5958 referred to a cognitohazardous entity by the name of Elias Cardinal that was in Foundation containment from April 7th, 2020 until January 1st, 2021. SCP-5958's cognitohazardous abilities were capable of changing one's memories.

Deleted at -14 and three votes.

Feedback Ported:

EstrellaYoshte

+ show block
– hide block

For a short-form SCP, it's definitely not a bad effort, but the article is ultimately let down by various collections of issues that led me to -1:

- The [REDACTED] in the footnote does not directly imply anything or established upon in any meaningful way, leading to wasted narrative motion.

- You tried to paint the researcher as incompetent, but it came off as more the systemic failure of the Foundation rather than the fault of any individual, which also makes the Foundation look incompetent.

- The implied punishment, likewise, is way too harsh, for a 9-year researcher which they already knew does not have much experience in cognitohazard. It's like they're trying to get them fired without and is only using this excuse as a cover.

item.title: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.: Re: SCP Announcements 47: SCP-5738
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5378 Hourling
I have recently created an entry on an anomalous being. i wonder if anyone who is a professional editor is willing to correct it.
Happyness is how you spell the entities name it is not an error. Hourling is what the entity calls the species it is.

item.title: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.: Re: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.
item.content:encoded: Deleted scp-5193 fragments 1 and 2, missed fragments that weren't deleted when the original page was.witnessed by tsat

item.title: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.: Re: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5127 resembles an ancient Egyptian Anubis statue composed of clay. When temperature is above -2.222 degrees celsius and bellow 1,780 °C (Clays freezing and melting point) SCP-5127 will become animate. Whenever 5127 is referred to as SCP-5127, SCP-5127 will demand to be referred to as Anubis.

Deleted at -20 and three votes.

SCP-5133 is a pale red flower composed of a host's organic tissue. Its' size differs from about 10 to 30 centimetres tall. Analysis of the stem has revealed thousands of tiny hairs that cause an itching sensation upon physical contact.

Deleted at -13 and three votes.

SCP-5968 is an insect that is a dark blue color. SCP-5968 is known for it’s very dark blue color which makes it distinct from other insects. The Specimen seems to have no sentience whatsoever and seems to have the same behavior as regular insects. The specimen is abnormally large compared to it’s counterparts. SCP-5968 takes the form of various insects, usually beetles or roaches. The SCP will also take the form of other insects such as butterflies, mantises and stink bugs. It can also take the form of arachnids too. When SCP-5968 is near any personnel it will be found lurking in said personnel’s area.

Deleted at -14 and three votes.

SCP-5418 is a seventeen-year-old male humanoid of Mongolian descent. SCP-5418 introduces itself as Oulen. The entity posses low telekinesis ability and is Type green reality-bender.

Deleted at -12 and three votes.

item.title: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.: Re: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.
item.content:encoded: deleted scp-5615 for being a blank page. witnessed by sqyd.

item.title: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.: Re: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.
item.content:encoded: Deleted scp-5188 twice for being a failed self deletion. Witnessed by riemann and procy.

item.title: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded: Apologies, this SCP was deleted.

item.title: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5978: Curse of Saint Mary

SCP-5978 is a god bound to earth by lust for misery and power. And now is in the Custody of the foundation. Classification Keter. Meet one of the most dangerous SCP code named Saint Mary. My first ever SCP. Hope you all will have a great time reading it and a happy new year to everyone :)

item.title: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Out of Frame is now live.

While a Site Director works to try an abolish the Foundation Department of Photography, a member of the latter organization snaps their last pic.

item.title: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.: Re: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.
item.content:encoded:
/scp-4273 (no title) by GamerNick deleted at -24 and three votes.

SCP-4273 is an island just off the coast of Greenland, very much resembling the shape of the island from the beloved children’s book series, “The Railway Series”. It appears to be a fully functioning society, though, no human entities inhabit the island.

item.title: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5922 Textually Transmited Cognitohazard

This is my first SCP, it's a very short article about a Discord chat incident.

item.title: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Who Framed Ralph Roget? - Site-43 world tour goes to Italy, and meets underground fascist demons!

item.title: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.: Re: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.
item.content:encoded: SCP-5127 summaried for no content, N_Aepic_Fael witnessing.

item.title: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5390 Out Of Time

This is my very first SCP about an old man and his timeless pocket watch.

Hope you all enjoy it! :)

item.title: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.: Re: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.
item.content:encoded:
Deleted an article by Edmund pao at -25 with three staff votes, standard deletion process.

Description : Scp 5136 is a dream that will go from victim to victim. Although the dream can take many forms, the most common form taken is a child like face with hollow eyes spiked hair and a dirty face. Scp 5136 'S hunting pattern is unknown, and can take place anywhere on earth so long the person is alive.

No feedback present.

Deleted an article by KelvinKW at -19 with three staff votes, standard deletion process.

Description: SCP-5968 is a gaming headphone that is capable of terminating any of its users. SCP-5968 is covered in a layer of rust and is made of a highly toxic metal that resembles chlorine. Although it does not react violently towards air, it will decay any metal and cells that it touches. SCP-5968 is capable of moving after the subject puts on the set. It is not yet able to sustain complete control of the subject since it decays the subject in such a violent way that the subject will die in approximately 2 minutes.

No feedback present.

Deleted an article by Coleton richardson at -18 with three staff votes, standard deletion process.

Description: SCP-5161 is a wooden children’s toy more commonly known as “Cup-And-Ball” with a red circle on the top end of the “cup” with green and black lines of the outer end of the “cup.”

Feedback is as follows:

+ ISNorden
– ISNorden

Having an anomalous low-tech game with built-in auto-cheating? Makes sense.

Using the player's muscle mass to repair damage to itself? Makes less sense for a game that depends mainly on hand-eye coordination; I'd have this skip inflict similar neurological damage, worsening vision and motor/manual skills instead of taking a literal pound of flesh.

Deleted an article by Reonicles19 at -17 with three staff votes, standard deletion process.

Description: SCP - 5179 is a winged serpent with no head or tail, rather the entity is a self enclosed loop and is often twisted so it can compress itself when in smaller areas. The entity has many sets of white feathered wings along its body at regular intervals. On the body segment of the entity, between the set of wings is a large eye with a diameter of 65 centimeters. The eyes are of different animals at different points in the entity’s body. The eyes of horses, cats, dogs, fish, humans, snakes and their close relatives have been noted on the entity's body but larger than their natural sizes. SCP - 5179 is covered in pale gold fur which has a lustrous quality to it.

+ Daemon2266
– Daemon2266

Good idea, but it needs to be written differently. For instance, "SCP - 5179 is to be contained in a container which is made of bismuth metal sheeting on all surfaces." Change repetitive statements like 'contained in a container' and find new, less redundant ways of expressing your ideas. Check out some of the other SCPs and check out how the authors wrote their articles. It might be a good idea to take notes on how they write their articles to see how you can redo this article for the better.

Deleted an article by DrPepperThePeeper at -13 with three staff votes, standard deletion process.

Description: SCP-5171 appears as a tunnel with a road running through it located under a bridge. The tunnel itself is a gateway to an area in between space and time, which is classified as SCP-5171-1. SCP-5171-1 appears to be infinite grasslands with a dirt road running through them. The weather inside SCP-5171-1 has been observed to always be raining, however the substance raining from the sky is not considered to be water. The substance raining from the sky inside of SCP-5171-1 appears to be a mixture of tears and blood. The origin of these substances is still unknown, as the clouds inside SCP-5171-1 are non-anomalous.

No feedback present.

Deleted an article by KSforShort at -11 with three staff votes, standard deletion process.

Description: SCP-5129 is a frog carved out of jade, measuring 10 centimeters in length and dated to be approximately 1000 years old. When in its inactive state, it displays no anomalous characteristics. Once activated by its intended user (SCP-5129-1), it begins to emit harmless levels of █████████ radiation, and air pressure within a 3 meter sphere drops to 27.50 Hg. SCP-5129-1 then telepathically hears a voice1 which is unanimously described as having a deep, booming quality. In every test to date, this voice has only been reported saying: "DO YOU WISH TO EMERGE?" If SCP-5129-1 declines, then SCP-5129 immediately returns to an inactive state.

Feedback is as follows:

+ Zyn
– Zyn

Proper clinical tone for an SCP write-up

I'm personally going to disagree with this—there are several instances of non-clinical phrasing, immediately from the description:

SCP-5129 is a small frog carved out of jade, dated to be approximately one thousand years old. While inactive, it displays no anomalous characteristics. When activated by its intended user (who shall be referred to as SCP-5129-1), it begins to emit harmless levels of █████████ radiation, and air pressure within a ten foot sphere drops to 27.50 Hg.

  • "Small" is a vague measurement and can vary in visualization between individuals. Better to give an objective measurement of the frog so people can immediately know what size it is beyond "small".
  • Numbers greater than 10 (and all measurements with units) should be written as numbers, not words. "Approximately 1000 years".
  • The second sentence can be removed since it's kind of commonsense?
  • The bit in the parentheses is overly long, and can be shortened to "designated SCP-5129-1".
  • Feet are not metric measurements; meters should be used instead.
  • It's not stated where the spherical effect occurs with relation to the object.

The rest of the article has similarly non-clinical writing. Not a huge deal all things considered, but noticeable enough to break immersion for some readers.

Footnotes
1. This voice always speaks in the first or preferred language of SCP-5129-1

item.title: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.: Re: SCP Announcements 47: Life is like riding a bicycle.
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5623: Star Euthanizer

It is about a spaceship and it's weird interaction with stars. My first SCP that includes something of a bigger scale.

item.title: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.: Re: Deletions 70: If the fact will not fit the theory – let the theory go.
item.content:encoded:
/scp-5181 (no title) by Vito loureiro deleted at -19 for plagiarism. Deadly Bread witnessed.

SCP-5181 consiste numa entidade humanoíde com aproxidamente 1.80 de metros de altura, 30 anos e cerca de 73 kilogramas, uma das caratecristicas mais únicas de SCP-5181 é a uma armadura feita de um material "desconhecido" e incrivelmente resistente, SCP-5181 prefere que o tratem por "genji", uma das carateristicas que tornam "Genji" tão perigoso é as suas incriveis habilidades sobrehumanas como ter uma resistencia muito superior a qualqur ser humano e ser uma autentico "Exterminador" em combate graças principalmente á sua armadura biónica e ás suas duas espadas que que estão presas á armadura que se mostraram impossiveis de ser retiradas por outra pessoa a não ser por ele próprio, até hoje não foi possivel retirar a armadura biónica de "Genji" por qualquer meio.

item.title: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
The Drooling Path: Part 3 - the long-awaited third installment in my series about SCP-058, SCP-1981, and an unhinged researcher's dangerous quest to understand them, featuring a certain spooky hotel room.

Edit: fixed link. Something about the colon in the title made things screwy.
